steps.title: Understand percent increase
steps.content: When mass increases by 676%, the new mass is the original mass plus 676% of the original mass. This means the new mass is (100% + 676%) = 776% of the original.

steps.title: Convert to decimal and solve
steps.content:
Convert 776% to a decimal multiplier: 776% = 7.76. Therefore, the new mass is:
$$\text{New mass} = 7.76k$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
